zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Augustina Dormer於1424年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利時，她的父親Geoffrey Dormer IV7歲，母親Alice Ursulla Collingridge7歲。她於1440年與Sir John Richard Baldwin在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1466年3月10日在英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Augustina Dormer于1424年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利时，她的父亲Geoffrey Dormer IV7岁，母亲Alice Ursulla Collingridge7岁。她于1440年与Sir John Richard Baldwin在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1466年3月10日在英国巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dormer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for a lazy man or a sleepyhead from Old French dormeur ‘sleeper, sluggard’ (from Latin dormitor, from dormire ‘to sleep’).

Irish (Kilkenny): when not of the same origin as 1 above, this is a shortened Anglicized form of the Donegal name Ó Díorma, a shortened form of Ó Duibhdhíormaigh ‘descendant of Duibhdhíormach’, a personal name composed of Gaelic dubh ‘black’ + díormach ‘trooper’.
German (Dörmer): occupational name for a watchman on a tower (of a castle or town), from an agent derivative of Middle Low German torn or Middle High German turn ‘tower’. Compare Dermer and Dorner .

variants.name: Dermer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hersh, Pinchas, Yaffa.
German: from an old personal name, Terrimar, a variant of Därr (see Darr ).
German: variant of Dörmer (see Dormer ), an occupational name for a watchman, someone who manned a tower. Compare Derner .

variants.name: Dearmond
meanings: Irish: variant of Dermond, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duibhdhiorma ‘descendant of Duibhdhiorma’ a personal name meaning ‘black trooper’ (see Dormer 2). There has been some confusion between the personal names Duibhdhiorma and Diarmaid, so that Dearmond alternates with McDermott . See also Dearman 2.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Augustina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Augustus  , a recent coinage.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Augustina Dormer was born in 1424, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Geoffrey Dormer IV, was 7 and her mother, Alice Ursulla Collingridge, was 7. She married Sir John Richard Baldwin in 1440, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 10 March 1466, in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Augustina Dormer est née en 1424, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey Dormer IV, avait 7 ans et sa mère, Alice Ursulla Collingridge, avait 7 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Richard Baldwin en 1440, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1466, à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Augustina Dormerが1424年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Dormer IVは7歳，母Alice Ursulla Collingridgeは7歳であった。1440年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーでSir John Richard Baldwinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1466年3月10日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Augustina Dormer(이)가 1424년 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey Dormer IV(은)는 7세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Ursulla Collingridge(은)는 7세였다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 Sir John Richard Baldwin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 3월 10일 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Augustina Dormer родилась в 1424 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey Dormer IV было 7 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Ursulla Collingridge, 7. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Richard Baldwin в 1440 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 марта 1466 г. в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
